_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: both KSR1 mutants S443A and 4xA produce a greater increase in the number of multipolar cells than wild-type KSR1, demonstrating that the morphological changes are directly proportional to the biological activity of KSR1
resourceName: Schwann cells from healthy nerve donors
details: KSR1 mutants S443A and 4xA produced greater increase in multipolar cells compared to wild-type KSR1, with morphological changes directly proportional to KSR1 biological activity
